class.name: AudioStreamPlaybackInteractive
class.description: Playback component of [AudioStreamInteractive]. Contains functions to switch to different clips ([AudioStreamInteractive]'s sub-streams).

method.name: get_current_clip_index
method.description: Returns the index of the currently playing clip. You can use this to get the name of the currently playing clip with [method AudioStreamInteractive.get_clip_name].

method.name: switch_to_clip
method.description: Switches to the clip with the given index.

method.name: switch_to_clip_by_name
method.description: Switches to the clip with the given name.
